mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_record (refund_no, payment_order_id, appointment_id, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_type, status, create_time) VALUES (#{refundNo}, #{paymentOrderId}, #{appointmentId}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundReason}, #{refundType}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, refund_no, payment_order_id, appointment_id, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_type, status, create_time FROM refund_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, refund_no, payment_order_id, appointment_id, refund_amount, refund_reason, refund_type, status, create_time FROM refund_record WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
